name: paperjury-codex
description: Pre-submission AI review stress-test for research papers in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run adversarial pre-submission review and guarded LaTeX revisions.
interface.longDescription: PaperJury Codex packages a pre-submission research-paper review workflow: direct LaTeX edits, multi-perspective mock review, deterministic ledgers, compile checks, and opt-in goal-driven review-revise loops.
defaultPrompt: Use PaperJury to review my CS paper before submission.
Run a PaperJury compliance check on this LaTeX paper.
Polish this paper passage with PaperJury.
